summary: Complete frontend testing of /blog page redesign with Precision Craft design system. All 10 sections verified. 100% pass rate with all features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog page (/blog) fully verified with Precision Craft design system. All 10 sections working: (1) Hero with breadcrumb 'Home -> Blog', eyebrow 'APPLIANCE REPAIR TIPS & ADVICE', H1 'Expert Tips to Keep Your Appliances Running', subtitle, search input with placeholder 'Search for appliance tips...'. (2) Sticky Filter Tabs with 11 categories: All Tips, Dishwasher, Dryer, Error Codes, Expert Advice, Maintenance Tips, Oven, Refrigerator, Repair Costs, Safety, Washer. Active tab has #FF5722 background, position: sticky at top: 64px. (3) Featured Article section with large image, 'Featured' badge, category tags (Repair Costs, Refrigerator), title, excerpt, date, 'Read Full Article' button. (4) Articles Grid with 3-column layout (lg:grid-cols-3), 16 article cards with images, category pills, read time, titles, excerpts, dates, 'Read More' links. (5) Why Trust Our Advice section with 3 cards (Certified Technicians, Practical Tips, Always Updated), ghost numbers 01/02/03, no emojis. (6) CTA Strip with #FF5722 background, 'Schedule Repair Now' and 'Call (760) 543-5733' buttons, no emojis. (7) UnifiedFooter with SERVICES/COMPANY columns, License #51001 box, Book Service CTA. (8) Floating 'BOOK REPAIR' button visible after scrolling >300px on desktop (hidden on mobile). (9) Mobile Sticky Bar with CALL/BOOK ONLINE/TEXT US buttons visible on mobile. (10) SEO: title 'Appliance Repair Tips & Guides | FixitBay Blog', meta description present, canonical https://fixitbay.net/blog, JSON-LD schemas (Blog, BreadcrumbList, LocalBusiness). Design tokens: navy #0D1B2A, cream #F8F5F0, accent #FF5722, Montserrat font. Search filters articles by title/excerpt in real-time. Category filter clicks work correctly. Article links navigate to /blog/{slug}. All 19 images loaded without 404 errors. No console errors.
tests_passed: Hero section: breadcrumb 'Home -> Blog' with arrow, eyebrow 'APPLIANCE REPAIR TIPS & ADVICE', H1 correct, subtitle present, search input with placeholder
Search functionality: typing 'refrigerator' shows 'Found 4 results' and filters articles in real-time
Filter tabs: 11 categories present (All Tips + 10 categories), sticky at top 64px
Active filter tab has #FF5722 background, clicking Dishwasher filter shows 3 articles, clicking All Tips resets
Featured Article section: 'Featured' badge, category tags, title, excerpt, date, 'Read Full Article' button
Articles grid: 3-column layout (lg:grid-cols-3), 16 cards with images, category pills, read time, titles, excerpts, dates, 'Read More' links
All 19 images loaded successfully (no 404 errors)
Article links navigate to /blog/{slug} format correctly
Why Trust Our Advice: 3 cards (Certified Technicians, Practical Tips, Always Updated), ghost numbers 01/02/03, no emojis
CTA Strip: #FF5722 background, 'Schedule Repair Now' and 'Call (760) 543-5733' buttons, no emojis
UnifiedFooter: SERVICES/COMPANY columns, License #51001, phone (760) 543-5733, Book Service CTA
Floating 'BOOK REPAIR' button visible on desktop after scroll, hidden on mobile
Mobile sticky bar: CALL/BOOK ONLINE/TEXT US buttons visible on mobile viewport (390x844)
SEO title: 'Appliance Repair Tips & Guides | FixitBay Blog'
Meta description present and mentions appliance repair tips
Canonical URL: https://fixitbay.net/blog
OG tags present (og:title, og:description, og:url)
JSON-LD schemas: Blog schema, BreadcrumbList schema, LocalBusiness schema
Design tokens verified: navy #0D1B2A (hero, filters, trust), cream #F8F5F0 (grid), accent #FF5722 (buttons, active tabs)
Montserrat font family used throughout
No console errors on page
